sections.paragraph:
(from the root עָדָה) in pause עֶדִי, with suff. עֶדְיִי m.-

(1) age, Psa 103:5 (Targ. old age); opp. to נְעוּרִים; see the root No. 1; compare עַד A, 1.

(2) ornament (see the root No. 3), Exo 33:4, Exo 33:6 Jer 4:30. עֲדִי עֲדָיִים most splendid ornament, Eze 16:7. Used of the ornaments of a horse, trappings, Psa 32:9.

[Note. Many attribute to this word the signification of mouth.]
